articles.title: 50 Mayon evacuees in Albay down with chickenpox
articles.description: CAMALIG, ALBAY, Philippines — At least 50 evacuees staying in evacuation centers here for more than four months now have contracted chickenpox or bulutong-tubig, local disaster officials said on Wednesday. Dr. Rommel Negrete, chief of the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office (MDRRMO), said 19 families were affected by the contagious disease, which he said was aggravated by the prevailing hot weather. Negrete said infected residents were immediately transferred to isolation areas to prevent the spread of the disease inside evacuation centers housing families displaced by the unrest of Mayon Volcano. “Everyone is safe and being treated. If there [...]... Keep on reading: 50 Mayon evacuees in Albay down with chickenpox

articles.title: Police corporal held for punching partner’s alleged lover in Mandaluyong
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — A police corporal was taken into custody for allegedly punching his partner’s alleged lover in Mandaluyong City, the police said on Wednesday. The implicated cop surrendered to his station commander and was brought to the city police after crossing paths with his foe along Correctional Road in Barangay Addition Hills on Tuesday night, Mandaluyong police chief Col. Reynan Patam said in a briefing in Camp Crame. “The suspect saw the victim there and yelled, ‘So, you’re here!’ He punched him. The victim ran toward his house, but the suspect followed him. When the suspect caught up with [...]... Keep on reading: Police corporal held for punching partner’s alleged lover in Mandaluyong

articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — A police sergeant was arrested for an alleged lascivious act against a 14-year-old girl in Malabon City, the police said on Wednesday. The alleged incident took place along Salmon Street in Barangay Longos on Tuesday night, according to Malabon police chief Col. Allan Umipig in a press briefing in Camp Crame. “The police officer was drunk and touched the young girl’s private parts from behind,” Umipig said, speaking in Filipino. articles.title: Napolcom: New raps for vlogger Francis Leo Marcos over unlicensed guards
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Criminal Investigation and Detection Group (CIDG) has filed additional criminal complaints against vlogger Norman Mangusin, more commonly known as Francis Leo Marcos, in connection with allegedly unlicensed security guards. In a statement on Tuesday night, the National Police Commission (Napolcom) said the CIDG had filed the complaints against Mangusin and nine others earlier that day before the Quezon City Prosecutor’s Office for violation of Republic Act No. 11917 or the Private Security Services Industry Act. READ: CIDG arrests vlogger Francis Leo Marcos – Napolcom “The complaint... involves the alleged practice of the private security profession without [...]...
